description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a light gray gable roof and beige siding, set on a green lawn with a curved stone walkway leading to the front door. The front facade features a covered entryway with columns, multiple white-framed windows, and a small flower bed. Mature trees and shrubs are arranged around the property, providing shade and privacy. On one side, there is a detached garage with a sloped roof and a wooden shed, both accessible from the backyard. The rear of the house has additional windows and a small back door, with a wooden deck or patio area adjacent to the shed. The overall design is symmetrical and traditional, with clean lines and classic residential features.
description: A two-story beige house with a gray gable roof, white-trimmed windows, a covered front entry, and surrounding trees, set on a green lawn with a curved walkway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a covered porch, symmetrical windows, and a curved stone walkway leading up to the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable end, garage, and wooden shed, with visible backyard landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back door, wooden deck or patio, and the arrangement of outbuildings and trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, more landscaping, and the continuation of the curved walkway.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front entry with columns, small steps, and a decorative overhang
